feedback.text: I would like if this act contained some sort of enforcement of the consumer right to videogames that the consumer has purchased as a good, that the company, which created the game, want to take away from the consumer and eradicate after purchase. It would apply to all games sold under a perpetual license, no matter if the game is online only or not. Please consider this request, as I feel that it is a point of interest of the Digital Fairness Act.
